heading: Direct payment of forest products receipts
label: 3107 Direct payment of forest products receipts

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: a Regulations
children.text: Notwithstanding any other law, the Secretary shall, within 1 year from , promulgate regulations providing for the payment of the receipts from the sale of Indian forest products as provided in this section.November 28, 1990

children.heading: Payment into a bank depository
children.label: b Payment into a bank depository
children.text: Upon the request of an Indian tribe, the Secretary shall provide that the purchaser of the forest products of such tribe, which are harvested under a timber sale contract, permit or other harvest sale document which has been approved by the Secretary, shall make prompt direct payments of the gross proceeds of sales of such forest products, less any amounts segregated as forest management deductions pursuant to , into a bank depository account designated by such Indian tribe.section 3105 of this title
